title: Fix alias-based child visibility in tree traversal (string_content)
description: The runtime never consults alias sequences when determining child visibility. Hidden symbols aliased to visible names (e.g. _doublequote_string_content → string_content) are treated as hidden and skipped. Fix needed at 4 locations: subtree.go:744 (SummarizeChildren), tree.go:245 (findVisibleChildByIndex), tree.go:301 (findNamedChildByIndex), tree_cursor.go:118 (findFirstVisibleChild). At each location, resolve alias from parent production ID + structural child index; if alias != 0, treat child as visible. Impact: ~67 tests (Perl 57 + Lua 10), plus potential improvements for Ruby and other languages with hidden-aliased nodes.
